message: Found 0 actionable tech_debt comments in 2 target files (significados-curados-helpers.test.ts, significados-curados.test.ts). ast_grep not available; used grep -rEn 'TODO|FIXME|XXX|HACK|@ts-ignore|@ts-expect-error|tech_debt|TODO:|FIXME:' as fallback. Initial grep for 'tech_debt' returned no matches. Word-boundary check for TODO/FIXME/XXX/HACK returned no matches. The only false positive was 'TODOS_PILARES' (a const meaning 'all pillars' = [cabala, astrologia, tantrica, odu, iching], not a TODO marker). Both files are clean of actionable tech_debt markers. No commits needed.
